channel.title: Starbucks on WithinTrend — Part-Time Job Reviews & Guides
channel.description: Recent content in Starbucks on WithinTrend — Part-Time Job Reviews & Guides

item.title: Working as a Starbucks Barista Part-Time: An Honest Review
item.description: What's it really like working as a Starbucks barista? Pay, hours, pros, cons, and tips from real baristas.
